deferred_to_upstream.summary: TOCTOU window in cliutil.AdaptiveLimiter.Wait() allows burst under concurrent sync workers.
deferred_to_upstream.reason: Greptile P2 flagged that between the first Unlock and the second Lock in Wait(), N goroutines under `sync --concurrency N` can all read the same stale lastRequest, compute identical sleeps, and burst-fire requests. The lock guards reads and writes but not the decision between them. The file lives in internal/cliutil/, which is generator-reserved per cli-printing-press's Phase 4.95 review policy: 'Out of scope: internal/cliutil/ and internal/mcp/cobratree/. Any finding there is a machine bug; route to retro, do not patch in place.' Patching the printed CLI hides the machine bug from the next CLI; the correct fix is a token-bucket or time.Ticker-based gate in cli-printing-press's emitter template.
